mapper.select: SELECT id, org_id, code, name, type, created_at FROM groups ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT g.id, g.org_id, g.code, g.name, g.type, g.created_at FROM groups g INNER JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = g.id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY g.created_at DESC
SELECT g.id, g.org_id, g.code, g.name, g.type, g.created_at FROM groups g INNER JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = g.id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} AND g.type = 'CHAT' ORDER BY g.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO groups (id, org_id, code, name, type, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{orgId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{type}, #{createdAt})
